comment: LOA Logs <= 1.47.0. root = the encounter object. `players` is bound to the selected party's PLAYER entities; `member` to the focused support (or null). Intermediates with scope:'member' re-bind `players` to just [member], which is how the same expression form is reused to filter a single member instead of the whole party.

intermediates.comment: Party DPS entities: dealt damage AND not a support (by spec - data/support_specs.json, the same list scraper.ts uses). Supports DO deal non-zero damage, so damageDealt>0 alone does not exclude them; the spec check does.
Uptime denominator: party-wide BUFFABLE damage (damageDealt minus fixed/unbuffable damage - hyper-awakening + special skills). See expr/partyDamageDealt.ts.

fields.comment: Boss/content name (sheet may map to content type)
Support's ark-passive Spec evolution points from the log (id 1010200). Phase-1 preview only - not a cell; the UI uses it to resolve the pet 'auto' choice before phase 2.
Support's ark-passive Swiftness evolution points from the log (id 1010400). Phase-1 preview only.
AP buff uptime = party buffedBySupport / party damageDealt

BC17: of the party's attack-power-buff damage (Attack Buff Categorization - encounterDamageStats.buffs[id].uniqueGroup in atkPwrGrp [101105 Pala, 314004 Artist, 101204 Bard, 480030 Valk]), the proportion attributable to the support's ap1 skill. Numerator = AP-buffedBy damage whose buff source.skill.id (kept as buffs[id].skillId) is an ap1 skill (ref.skills filtered to type==='ap1', e.g. Bard Heavenly Tune 21160); denominator = all AP-buffedBy damage (ap1 + ap2). A party has one support of one class so the ap1 set is effectively that class's single ap1 id. Requires the buffs {uniqueGroup,skillId} projection kept by scrapeStrip.ts (STRIP_VERSION 3).

Cheers uptime: 'Cheers' is the community's (outdated) name for this buff - SkillBuff.json now names it 'Pray', uniqueGroup 605100081 with 4 tiers (ids 605100081-605100084). The old uniqueGroup 605000043 ('Cheers' ids 605000045-605000048) is the prior version's ids and no longer applies.

BJ15: bard Major Chord (buff categories 214020-214028) OR valk Wings of Freedom (480024-480026). A party has a single support of one class, so the ranges are mutually exclusive and summing both yields the right cell value regardless of support type.
Strength orb uptime: buff ids 523401-523493 (SkillBuff.json name 'Strength Orb'; hundreds-place prefix 5234, not a tens-place prefix).
Flash orb uptime: buff ids 523501-523593 (SkillBuff.json name 'Flash Orb'; hundreds-place prefix 5235, not a tens-place prefix).
